title: LCR Chain Carrier
status: first formal manuscript and finite verifier promoted

core_correction.old_overclaim: Opposed boundaries were sometimes treated as L != R over shell-2 states.
core_correction.corrected_claim: L and R are opposed directions as addresses; they are not required to have unequal values in every state.

next_obligations: Wire verify_lcr_carrier into the installable cqe_engine.formal interface.
Carry the address-vs-value distinction into Paper 03 triality language.
Use this format as the polish pattern for the remaining papers.
